Reviews.Author: 17blqeudjq
Reviews.Comment:
Just released yesterday, its a decent executor with basic functionality. This has been named as Synapse X's V3's full implementation. The UI brings back some memories from Krampus & the old Synapse Z, gave all users 90 days for a 2 year downtime as compensation.

Could use a UI update, yet it does the job as well as any other paid executor. Would purchase if my subscription expired.

Reviews.Author: 1mh31o1afl
Reviews.Comment: Good public beta release, decently cheaper than the competition, has a RakNet library, which is a positive unlike other executors, and custom UIs. Krampus release but more stable.

Categories.Comment: Pretty good; it doesn't fail often anymore with scripts as prior to the patch (3/12/2026 8:52 PM) unless it itself doesn't support it—a dev issue, then.
Marginal performance gains/decreases, unnoticeable for the most part.
Stability used to be extremely ass; the issue has been resolved as of recently, though it's still in beta, which is acceptable.

Interal Imgui is pretty nice despite mixed feedback from other users. Also a cool concept with the monopoly of custom UIs like Krampus, it's pretty creative, but the current implementation of such does create vulnerability issues on the end of the user downloading said UIs, as there are no current restrictions blocking any user from implementing malicious code and potentially ratting a user with a custom UI.
Updates are consistent and obviously good considering the current state of the executor being in beta at the moment.
alrg
